emails.subject: Iroquois Parking Fees
emails.body: Iroquois Parking Fees Chris, We paid parking fees to Iroquois in two months: May 1999 $1,934.42 June 1999 $1,872.02 Total $3,806.44 Let me know if you need anything else. Chris
